title: Fishers
subtitle: A steady answer to early hunger

objectives.label: Research Spear Fishing
substeps: Open Research at the settlement Campfire.
Spear Fishing unlocks the earliest fisher path for the Starvation crisis — long before the Fishery's rods.

objectives.label: Assign a Spear Fisher
substeps: The citizen should work near claimed fishable water.

objectives.label: Give the Spear Fisher a spear (optional)
substeps: A spear in the tool slot is optional — a spear fisher will fish bare-handed without one.
Preferred storage can also provide spears.
A better spear makes the spear fisher faster.

objectives.label: Mark fish drop-off storage
substeps: Click the drop-off row in the Job tab.
Right-click claimed storage near the shore.
Spear fishers deposit their catches there.

pages.text: Fishers turn nearby water into real catches in storage. Fishing is one of the cleanest ways to answer the Starvation crisis because stocked fish can create a food rate before fields or herds mature.
